gist.headline: The hive's new bouncer
gist.blurb: We've taught our AI tools how to spot and sweep away bot farms automatically. That means faster generations and more resources for the real artists and tinkerers in our community!
gist.summary: Introduced an automated abuse-detection skill for Claude Code to identify and filter out bot farm traffic.
gist.impact: By efficiently managing automated spam, we're ensuring the platform remains fast, reliable, and generously available for genuine creators.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly gardener or bouncer protecting the servers. The Nomnom creature is helping out by eating the 'bad' requests (spam/errors) to keep the system clean.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny security badge, gently sweeping away small pixelated robotic bugs from a glowing lime green (#ecf874) server rack in a lush digital garden. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of paper labeled 'SPAM'. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
